annotations.summary: Parakeet streaming capacity is above the warning headroom per ready replica.
annotations.user_impact: Live transcription may slow down or reject new streams if traffic continues to rise.
annotations.scope: Production Parakeet streaming pods; active streams are averaged across ready replicas.
annotations.verification: Compare active streams and ready replicas in the Parakeet dashboard and confirm the condition persists for the alert duration.
annotations.safe_next_action: Allow the HPA to add healthy replicas first; investigate capacity only after checking replica readiness and the dashboard.

title: Parakeet - streaming capacity near critical limit

annotations.summary: Parakeet streaming capacity is near the critical per-replica limit.
annotations.user_impact: Live transcription may be delayed or unable to accept new streams while existing sessions are protected.
annotations.scope: Production Parakeet streaming pods; active streams are averaged across ready replicas.
annotations.verification: Compare active streams and ready replicas in the Parakeet dashboard and confirm the condition persists for the alert duration.
annotations.safe_next_action: Allow the HPA to add healthy replicas first; investigate capacity only after checking replica readiness and the dashboard.

annotations.summary: An expected real-traffic journey metrics scrape target is absent or unhealthy
annotations.threshold: either named scrape job absent or any target up < 1

model.expr: (sum(rate(llm_gateway_chat_extraction_requests_total{mode="fallback"}[15m])) / clamp_min(sum(rate(llm_gateway_chat_extraction_requests_total{mode=~"serving|fallback"}[15m])), 1e-9) > bool 0.05) or (max(llm_gateway_circuit_open) > bool 0) or ((sum(increase(llm_gateway_chat_extraction_requests_total{mode=~"serving|fallback"}[15m])) >= bool 10) and (sum(increase(llm_gateway_chat_extraction_requests_total{mode="serving",outcome="success"}[15m])) == bool 0)) or (histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(llm_gateway_client_first_byte_seconds_bucket[5m])) by (le)) > bool 5)

annotations.summary: Client fallback, open circuit, zero gateway successes under traffic, or p95 first-byte latency indicates the gateway is unreachable or stalling
annotations.threshold: fallback >5%, circuit open, no serving success for 10 requests, or p95 first byte >5s
annotations.user_impact: Users may be unable to complete this Omi interaction or may experience degraded results.
annotations.scope: The Omi AI chat production service path.
annotations.verification: Verify the condition in the linked Grafana panel and correlate it with production traffic before intervention.
annotations.safe_next_action: Inspect the linked dashboard and the affected user path; mitigate through the documented service runbook only after verification.
